# T19 · "Explain Generated Files" — canRegenerate / safeToDelete

Model generated-by + regenerable + safe-to-delete (spec §30) so the UI can state e.g.
"Generated by: <broadcast> · Can be regenerated: yes · Safe to delete: yes, after rebuild".

**Do:**
- `assets` schema: new columns / derivation for generated-by + `canRegenerate` + `safeToDelete`.
- Expose on the asset resource.
- Render guidance in `vault-detail.view.php`.

**Done when:** generated assets show accurate regenerate / delete guidance.
